title: Deadhaus Sonata
desc: Deadhaus Sonata is a cooperative multiplayer, free-to-play, action RPG where you play the dead fighting the living. An unstoppable force from Deadhaus, you are a monster among men, dealing death and destruction on a massive scale.

title: RoadOut
desc:
The world is dominated by an A.I. and rebel groups take refuge in a desert area known as the DeadZone.

Claire survives by executing delivery, sabotage and murder contracts for local leaders, while discovering about her past, revealing strange evidence that links her existence with the origin of the A.I.

title: Girl.exe
desc: You and your friends go to another world because you wanted to find a girlfriend. And you found one.... There is one crazy girl in this world. Will you be able to get out of this world or will you stay with her forever?

title: Hotel Architect
desc:
Step into the chaotic 24/7 lifestyle of a hotel owner as you design and build grand hotels across the globe. Juggle the increasingly elaborate demands of disorderly guests, logistical nightmares and unexpected obstacles in Hotel Architect, the ultimate hotel construction and tycoon management game.

Advance in a career campaign mode, with a variety of objectives to complete, in order to unlock the sandbox mode across each location.

Create your own hotel from scratch or transform a dilapidated plot into a thriving business. Design the layout and hire construction workers to lay the foundations and build different facilities across multiple floors. Building requires careful planning, as it plays out in real-time, so be careful annoy, disturb or remove items your guests are using – or else they might leave a bad review!

title: Underling Uprising
desc: Play as the Underlings, a group of experiments created by evil mad science, as you seek revenge on your previous captor, the maniacal Dr. Baldrick! On their journey, the Underlings will need to fight across the globe, overcome the demons of their pasts, and accept help from unexpected places.

title: The Clubies
desc: The Clubies is a party platformer where players navigate cute cube characters through the disco to reach the dancefloor! Encounter various hazards, puzzles, and shortcuts in a fun, colorful environment as you master user-built levels together.

title: Whirlight: No Time To Trip
desc: In the heart of Verice Bay, a brilliant idea takes shape in the hands of an eccentric inventor and an eclectic artist. Follow Margaret and Hector in a point-and-click graphic adventure that will take you to the edge of space and time to help them avert imminent danger.

title: A Tale of Silent Depths
desc: A Tale of Silent Depths is a turn based tactical RPG set in a post-apocalyptic underwater setting. Explore a procedurally generated Ocean, command your submarine and fight beasts, pirates and creatures beyond your crew's comprehension.

title: Find Us Cats
desc: Find Us Cats is a new hidden object game starring our favorite feline companions! Find dozens of cats in each level and aim for a high score in Level 1 of our free demo, the Planetarium.

title: Dark Light: Survivor
desc: In a dying multiverse, the Phantom Train is your last hope. Traverse a post-apocalyptic, cyberpunk world of nightmarish creatures. Experience dynamic shifts between top-down and third-person views, deep customization, and epic battles across universes in this action roguelike survival game.

title: Subnautica 2
desc: Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure set on an all-new alien world, developed by Unknown Worlds. Play alone or with friends in 4-player co-op. Adapt to survive by building custom bases and crafting tools. Explore the unknown to uncover the mysteries hidden within the depths.

title: Creepy Tale: Snow Child
desc: A volatile cocktail of action and puzzles, spiced with pitch-black humor and a deliciously sinister atmosphere. Journey into Hell alongside a brave boy named Blizzy and defeat Evil itself. Save the world and become a hero. But at what cost?

title: Alchemist: Journey of the Soul
desc: First-person adventure game, playable solo or co-op with up to 4 people. Travel through unique areas, uncover memories and use them to craft powerful potions. Unlock special abilities and solve puzzles in a mysterious world. Will your soul survive this journey?

title: American Truck Simulator: Illinois
desc: Welcome to the beautiful Prairie State! Illinois showcases the best of what the USA has to offer. Hop into your rig, hit the legendary Route 66, and journey through Springfield, the state’s historic capital, to Chicago, one of the Midwest's most iconic cities.

title: Nova Patria
desc: Nova Patria is a Roman Steampunk Colony Sim. In this alternate history, the empire never fell and lived on to discover the New World and steam power. Manage intricate supply chains, expanding cities, and innovations in a hopeful, procedurally generated, isometric simulation of industrial antiquity.

title: Taste of Blood
desc: A real-time strategy game with a simple economy, designed so you can focus on the battle and crush your enemies.

title: Mysteries of Old Tokyo
desc: Step into the Imperial Capital, where knowledge is your weapon. Research and explore 40+ real-life Tokyo locations, past and present. Encounter a cast of wandering spirits, interrogate their stories, and separate the truth from their lies.

title: Mad King Redemption
desc: Mad King Redemption is a unique blend of a traditional beat'em'up game with strong roguelite progression, mixed in a pixelated graphic style in a 2.5D world. Relieve the king from his madness while beating up corrupted enemies, in a fresh way at every run!

title: Port Authority
desc: Port Authority is a real-time harbor management game where you draw routes guiding cargo ships to color-matched docks. Navigate increasingly chaotic traffic through harbors inspired by real-world locations as more vessels arrive. One collision ends it all. How many containers can you deliver?

title: Case Files: Internal Affairs
desc: The 3rd installment in the Case Files series. An FMV murder mystery, police interrogation, detective experience.

title: Who Do Voodoo
desc: A social deduction game where crafted cards become spells. Protect allies, sabotage rivals, or prank everyone in a magical fight for survival.

title: Let Me Play!
desc: After shouting "Let Me Play!" to the cast in a theatre, the fiction comes crashing down as everyone, including you, becomes aware they're only following a script. Will you let the play continue? Or will you write your own ending?

title: Wall Street Raider
desc: Wall Street Raider offers the deepest stock market simulations in gaming history. Control publicly traded corporations, futures, options, and even crypto. Whether you want to make billions in equities, short-sell overvalued stocks, or hedge risk using derivatives, the market is yours to conquer!

title: The Melty Way
desc: You move, you melt. Play as a brave size-shifting slime in this colorful precision puzzle-platformer, dashing through handcrafted puzzles and perilous traps on your journey in The Melty Way.

title: Maze Creep!!
desc: A satire co-op horror game where players aim to reach the end of an infinite series of mazes, evading the all-hearing Maze Creep and various other threats.

title: Panzer Corps 2: Allied Operations - Italy: Vol.1
desc: Lead the Allied invasion of Sicily in the opening chapter of a grand trilogy. Command British and American forces across two converging campaigns, carry your veteran core army forward, and relive the historic push that broke open Fortress Europe.

title: King Crab
desc: Dig trenches, build walls, explore the beach, and defend your sandcastle from the rising tide - on PC or in VR.

title: Do Not Feed the Virus
desc: Grow your organism, gather biomass, and expand your colony. A casual, mouse-driven incremental game focused on growth and progression.

title: What'Sub
desc: Work together as a pirate crew and plunder coffee across the oceans! Hold your (t)rusty submarine together, dodge disasters, fight dangers, and finally get the black gold home! Play this co-op action game with up to 4 players and try become the mightiest pirates of the underseas!

title: Tohotopia
desc: A 4X strategy craze sweeps Gensokyo! As the "Esports Tournament" begins, the girls join the fray. Warlords rise: will you be "Pharaoh" Remilia, "Emperor" Kaguya, "Great" Kanako, or "Philosopher King" Miko? Launch the game now, lead your empire, and dominate Gensokyo!

title: The Caribou Trail
desc: The WWI story where your goal isn't to kill, but to survive. In the still trenches, three soldiers learn the harsh truth of war: reckless missions, digging trenches, collecting dog tags and ghostly whispers in the dark. Home before the leaves fall, they thought.

title: Drifters Don't Brake: Midnight
desc: Drift through different terrains and tackle challenges while your car auto-accelerates nonstop.

title: CaseCracker3
desc: Sift crucial evidence from a sea of data. Reconstruct the case from fragmented narratives. Catch logical gaps hidden between the lines. Unearth the truth from the faintest traces! Youll need sharp logic and keen insight to conquer this fully immersive deduction challenge. Come onIm waiting.

title: Mineral Mining Simulator
desc: Turns raw rock into valuable minerals and jewelry grade gemstones through a hands on production chain. Mine ore, crush it into fragments, refine it, and scale your operation with better machines and smarter workflow. Optimize every stage of the pipeline to maximize efficiency, quality, and profit.

title: Luna's Room
desc: An unfamiliar room. Vague memories. Explore Luna's room through the objects inside it in this intimate narrative experience about loss, told as a classic-style graphic adventure.

title: Company of Heroes 3: Dare & Destroy
desc: Company of Heroes 3: Dare & Destroy is a Battlegroup DLC pack consisting of four Battlegroups for Multiplayer and Co-Op/ Skirmish vs AI.

title: Make Way: Legends Pack
desc: Stylishly smash the competition with the Legends Pack!

title: Mutiny's Wake
desc: A hardcore pirate survival game set during the Golden Age of Piracy. Stranded on a hostile island after a mutiny, you must scavenge, hunt, craft, and survive against pirates, wildlife, and dwindling resources.

title: Farthest Frontier: Cats and Dogs
desc: Enrich the lives of your hard-working settlers with the addition of cats and dogs. More than just companions, dogs will protect your crops from deer and the new ravenous groundhogs, and your chicken coops from shrewd fox invaders. They can accompany your hunters to keep them safe from wildlife and help rat catchers sniff out rat infestations. Cats may be their own masters, but they will keep rat populations under control, easing the burden on rat catchers. Villagers gladly take a pause from their busy lives in the frontier to play with their new pets, offering relief from life's hardships.

title: Snack and Quack: Duckling Steps
desc: Quack, Push, and Feed the Ducklings

title: Solo Shift!
desc: From cash register to fryer—you've got to manage it all! Take on waves of customers all by yourself! Run a convenience store solo in this frantic action game!

title: Colorizing: Daylight
desc: Coloring by numbers game for relaxation

title: Crayon Farm Animals
desc: My child's first digital sketchbook, color in the colorful farm animals! Complete cute cow, horse, and sheep friends with my fingertips, and fill your own animal picture book.

title: Tindark
desc:
Tindark is a loop-style psychological horror puzzle game where players take on the role of a dating-app user tasked with spotting anomalies among their daily matches.

Each day, eight profiles must be reviewed — swipe right on normal profiles, swipe left on anomalies. Reach Day 9 without making a mistake to escape the loop. Inspired by anomaly-spotting horror titles such as The Exit 8, a single playthrough lasts roughly 15 to 60 minutes.

title: Ignore the Blackbird
desc: Ignore the Blackbird is a hand-drawn watercolor puzzle game. Explore the greenhouse, solve puzzles woven into its surroundings, and uncover what happened to Sonya and her family.

title: Menace from the Deep: Complete Edition
desc: Menace from the Deep is a roguelike deckbuilder, set in myth-soaked 1920s USA, where cults and eldritch horrors lurk beneath the surface.

title: The Backrooms
desc: A journey chronicling 7 days... Can Terrence escape this liminar horror phenomenon? Or will he be trapped within this place forever?

title: Wizard Confidential
desc:
Sling spells and borrow trouble in a city lousy with bootleggers, bent coppers, and vampires. Can you crack the case and save your partner before a wizard dooms Seattle?

Wizard Confidential is an interactive urban fantasy noir novel by Anthony Eichenlaub, where your choices control the story. It's entirely text-based, 220,000 words and hundreds of choices, without graphics or sound effects, fueled by the vast unstoppable power of your imagination.

title: Trainz Plus: VR C Locomotive - RailFirst / CFCLA
desc: The C class locomotives were purchased by Victorian Railways for heavy freight haulage and are a variant of the WAGR L class, featuring safety cabs. This pack features the CFCLA and Railfirst livery versions of the C class locos.

title: Balorizon
desc: Tianping Line is a strategy RPG that blends event choices, character recruitment and growth, and auto-battles. Rule a fledgling nation, make decisions in domestic affairs and diplomacy, recruit unique characters, build your forces, expand your power, face crises, and shape the nation’s fate.
